skip_reason: Both backend (localhost:3001) and frontend (localhost:5173) were offline

escalations.title: Handlebars.js JavaScript Injection via AST Type Confusion (CVSS 9.8)
escalations.exploit_scenario: If user-controlled input flows into a Handlebars template compilation call (email/PDF generation, work item rendering), attacker injects arbitrary JavaScript executing in the Node.js process with full application privileges via AST type confusion.
escalations.impact: Remote code execution — OS-level access to server process
escalations.remediation: cd Source/Backend && npm update handlebars; cd platform/orchestrator && npm update; cd portal/Backend && npm update
escalations.verify: npm audit --audit-level=critical should return 0 critical findings after update

escalations.title: protobufjs Arbitrary Code Execution via .proto Parsing (CVSS 9.8)
escalations.exploit_scenario: protobufjs.load() has an ACE vulnerability in its .proto file parser. If an attacker controls a .proto file path consumed by the orchestrator's gRPC clients, arbitrary JavaScript executes in the Node.js process.
escalations.impact: Remote code execution — full server process compromise
escalations.remediation: cd platform/orchestrator && npm update protobufjs; cd portal/Backend && npm update protobufjs
escalations.verify: npm list protobufjs in each project should show version >= 7.5.5

p1_findings.title: GET /api/search Not Wired — 5 Tests Failing in CI
failing_tests: returns 200 and {data:[...]} with items matching the query
returns empty data array when query is empty
returns results from multiple work item types
returns items whose description matches the query
excludes deleted work items from search results
p1_findings.impact: 5 CI test failures on every run. DependencyPicker typeahead non-functional for all users.
p1_findings.remediation: Add app.get('/api/search', ...) mount in Source/Backend/src/app.ts before errorHandler. Logic: filter store.getAllItems() by title/description matching query param.

p2_findings.title: Traceability Enforcer Blind to 95+ Requirements in Specifications/
p2_findings.spec_ref: CLAUDE.md architecture rule: Specs are source of truth
p2_findings.impact: CI reports TRACEABILITY PASSED while 95+ requirements in Specifications/ have zero automated coverage. Spec drift accumulates silently.
p2_findings.remediation: Extend enforcer with --spec-file flag to check Specifications/dev-workflow-platform.md and Specifications/tiered-merge-pipeline.md. Update CLAUDE.md verification gates to call all three.

p2_findings.title: dependencyCheckDuration Histogram Missing from Source/Backend Metrics
p2_findings.impact: SLO monitoring for dependency check latency cannot be established. 1 of 4 specified Prometheus instruments missing.
p2_findings.remediation: Add dependencyCheckDuration Histogram to metrics.ts. Instrument isReady() and computeHasUnresolvedBlockers() with a timer. Add test in metrics.test.ts.

p2_findings.title: portal/Shared/api.ts Missing blocked_by Field in Update Types
p2_findings.impact: DependencyPicker.tsx uses 'as any' cast — shared type integrity violation per CLAUDE.md architecture rules.
p2_findings.remediation: Add blocked_by?: string[] to UpdateFeatureRequestInput and UpdateBugInput in portal/Shared/api.ts. Remove as any casts in DependencyPicker.tsx.

p2_findings.title: Portal Seed Data (seed.ts) Not Created
p2_findings.impact: Portal starts in state that does not demonstrate dependency features. Cannot verify feature on fresh deployment.
p2_findings.remediation: Create portal/Backend/src/database/seed.ts with idempotent seeding: BUG-0010 blocked_by BUG-0003..0007; FR-0004 blocked_by FR-0003; FR-0005 blocked_by FR-0002; FR-0007 blocked_by FR-0003. Call from index.ts after schema migration.

p2_findings.title: Portal DependencySection and BlockedBadge Tests Missing
p2_findings.impact: 226-line DependencySection and 70-line BlockedBadge components have zero test coverage despite being used in production detail and list views.
p2_findings.remediation: Create DependencySection.test.tsx (test blocked-by/blocks render, chip click, edit button, pending_dependencies highlight). Create BlockedBadge.test.tsx (red badge unresolved, amber pending_dependencies, none for clean). Each test must have // Verifies: FR-dependency-section or // Verifies: FR-dependency-blocked-badge.

p2_findings.title: path-to-regexp ReDoS (CVSS 7.5) in Orchestrator and Portal Backend
p2_findings.impact: Attacker crafts URL with many path parameters causing exponential regex backtracking — CPU exhaustion / denial of service.
p2_findings.remediation: cd platform/orchestrator && npm update path-to-regexp; cd portal/Backend && npm update path-to-regexp

p2_findings.title: picomatch ReDoS via Extglob Quantifiers (CVSS 7.5) — Build-Time
p2_findings.note: Build-time only — affects npm run dev and CI build, not production runtime
p2_findings.impact: Crafted file pattern causes build system hang during development or CI/CD timeout.

p3_findings.title: eslint-disable Without Explanation in DependencyPicker.tsx and useWorkItems.ts
Vite <5.2.0 Path Traversal in Optimised Deps (dev server)
esbuild <=0.24.2 CORS Bypass in Dev Server
brace-expansion <1.1.13 Process Hang via Zero-Step Sequences
uuid <14.0.0 Missing Buffer Bounds Check (disputed)
p3_findings.remediation: npm update uuid@>=14.0.0 (major version bump — test thoroughly)

p3_findings.title: @vitest/mocker Transitive vite Dependency Issue (test environment)
p3_findings.remediation: npm update vitest@>=4.1.5 — resolved when vite is updated

p3_findings.title: gaxios Inherited uuid Vulnerability (portal/Backend)
p3_findings.remediation: npm update gaxios@latest — resolved when uuid is updated

p4_findings.title: DebugPortalPage Verifies Comment Not FR-XXX Format
p4_findings.remediation: Assign a proper FR-ID or remove the non-standard Verifies comment

cross_reference_map.single_fix: Complete dependency-linking feature sprint: wire /api/search, add blocked_by types, create seed.ts, add frontend tests

cross_reference_map.root_cause: Transitive dependency staleness in orchestrator and portal stack
cross_reference_map.single_fix: npm update in platform/orchestrator and portal/Backend

cross_reference_map.root_cause: Traceability enforcer scope gap (reads Plans/ not Specifications/)
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Extend traceability-enforcer.py with --spec-file flag; update CLAUDE.md verification gates
cross_reference_map.note: Fixing this prevents future spec drift — QO-003..006 would have been caught earlier

grading.rationale: 3 P1 findings exceed grade C threshold (max_p1=2 per inspector.config.yml). Grade D: unlimited P1s.

phase_4_backlog.owner: TheFixer (resolved as side-effect of other updates)
